Home.subtitle: i build fullstack web applications, automate systems, and craft AI-powered software solutions.

About.title: about me
About.phrase: I'm Martí Castaño, a fullstack developer who loves creating projects that blend frontend, backend, and artificial intelligence. I'm always experimenting with new things — from building my own operating system with Arch Linux to tinkering with servers, home automation, and writing clean, efficient code.
About.approachDesc: I enjoy tackling challenges with creativity and efficiency, always aiming for clean, maintainable code. I'm particularly passionate about fullstack development, AI applications, and finding innovative solutions across web and systems programming.
About.notCodingDesc: Outside of coding, i love experimenting with home tech projects, tinkering with servers and home automation, and picking up new tools just for fun. You'll always find me exploring new technologies or tweaking my custom Arch Linux setup.

independent.description: Completed 5 courses covering UI design with Tailwind, frontend development with React, backend systems with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, and an introduction to AI and machine learning with Python.

programame.description: Reached the national final in Madrid, competing at the highest level. Solved complex algorithmic challenges using efficient data structures and won the special prize for being the fastest team to solve the first programming exercise.

codewars.description: Participated in the HP CodeWars competitive programming contest in Barcelona, visiting the HP offices and solving algorithmic problems in a collaborative team environment.

lattice.title: Lattice
lattice.category: Smart map and navigation system for large-scale festivals and events.
lattice.description: A platform designed so attendees at major festivals never get lost and organizers can manage everything effortlessly. It features a mobile app with a smooth interactive map guiding users in real time along accessible pedestrian routes, plus a web dashboard with heatmaps showing crowd density to help organizers coordinate access efficiently.

volta.title: Volta
volta.category: Appointment management with automatic WhatsApp reminders for local businesses.
volta.description: A digital tool for local shops and businesses to centrally manage their calendars, clients, and services. It automatically sends WhatsApp appointment reminders and includes a legal consent verification system to ensure strict compliance with data protection regulations.

iter-ecosystem.title: Iter Ecosystem
iter-ecosystem.category: Smart platform for organizing and evaluating educational workshops.
iter-ecosystem.description: An end-to-end system built to automate school workshop organization. It optimally distributes students into classes, uses AI speech recognition to evaluate competencies, and applies computer vision to automatically verify signatures on printed educational agreements.

muvv.title: Muvv
muvv.category: Real-time multiplayer exercise and fitness web application.
muvv.description: A fitness game and social network where users work out and compete with friends from home. Using the webcam, the system tracks body movements to count reps interactively. It supports virtual workout rooms, preset routines, progress history, and real-time global leaderboards.
